channel.title: Cache on Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cache on Blog

item.title: error JW_SIG_CFU & JW_SIG_PRG di Joomla 2.x
item.description: ganti permission di folder cache secara rekursif menjadi 777.

item.title: Squid Proxy + Mikrotik
item.description: I have installed a cache proxy to centos server and works with good TCP_HIT. i’m using centos 5.x. proxy took the data that we request from browsing activities and save it as cache. the second request will take from this cache, that means the connection uses full bandwith on the local network. we got two thing, reduce bandwith consumtion from the ISP and increase the speed. squid has other feature such as redirect, blocking, etc.
